name: Blackwing - Abrolhos the Megaquake
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>激</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>震</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアブロオロス
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. This card cannot destroy monsters by battle. If this card battles a monster, after damage calculation: Return that monster to the hand. Once per turn, during your Main Phase 1: You can have this card lose exactly 1000 ATK, and if you do, return all cards in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone to the hand.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. This card cannot destroy monsters by battle. If this card battles a monster, after damage calculation: Return that monster to the hand. Once per turn, during your Main Phase 1: You can have this card lose exactly 1000 ATK, and if you do, return all cards in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone to the hand.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. This card cannot destroy monsters by battle. If this card battles a monster, after damage calculation: Return that monster to the hand. action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Returns battling monster to hand after damage calculation
